import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

        # Classic combined interaction embedding (skill_id * 2 + correct)
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills * 2, embed_dim)
        self.input_norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0
        )
        # Initialize forget gate bias to 1.0 for better gradient flow
        for name, param in self.lstm.named_parameters():
            if 'bias' in name:
                n = param.size(0)
                param.data[n // 4:n // 2].fill_(1.0)

        self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        interact = skill_ids * 2 + corrects
        x = self.interaction_embed(interact)
        x = self.input_norm(x)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.output_norm(h)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h[:, :-1])
        return torch.sigmoid(logits)
